feed.title: Programming With Wolfgang
feed.subtitle: A tech blog focusing on DevOps, Cloud, Azure, Kubernetes and Software Architecture.

entry.title: Video - Karpenter for Azure - Hands on with AKS Node Auto Provisioning

link.title: Video - Karpenter for Azure - Hands on with AKS Node Auto Provisioning

entry.title: Karpenter for Azure - Hands on with AKS Node Auto Provisioning

link.title: Karpenter for Azure - Hands on with AKS Node Auto Provisioning

entry.summary: Traditional cluster autoscaling in Kubernetes has always felt a bit reactionary. For years, platform engineers have lived in a world dictated by rigid, predefined node pools. You deploy an application, wait for a pod to fail to schedule due to insufficient resources, and then watch the Cluster Autoscaler sluggishly trigger a virtual machine scale set expansion. Minutes later, generic compute ar...

entry.title: Speaking about automating TLS Certificates with Cert-Manager at the Azure Cloud Commanders Meetup

link.title: Speaking about automating TLS Certificates with Cert-Manager at the Azure Cloud Commanders Meetup

entry.summary: Manual certificate management is an operational liability waiting to happen. Tracking expiration dates, manually rotating keys, and managing long-lived secrets across numerous DNS zones is a recipe for a sudden, unexpected production outage. Join me on June 1st, 2026 at 3 PM ET for a deep dive into building a completely hands-off, zero-trust certificate infrastructure. Register and Join the S...

entry.title: Video - Multi Domain TLS in AKS - Cert Manager & Multiple DNS Solvers

link.title: Video - Multi Domain TLS in AKS - Cert Manager & Multiple DNS Solvers

entry.title: Multi Domain TLS in AKS - Cert Manager & Multiple DNS Solvers

link.title: Multi Domain TLS in AKS - Cert Manager & Multiple DNS Solvers

entry.summary: Managing TLS certificates for a single domain is a solved problem. However, as you scale an internal engineering platform, handling dozens of subdomains across multiple Azure DNS zones requires a more robust strategy. In this guide, we move beyond legacy Ingress controllers and leverage the Kubernetes Gateway API along with cert-manager to automate certificate lifecycles via the DNS-01 challen...
